name: Chicken Soup with Tiny Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in a large saucepan filled with water. Add salt, pepper, basil, bay leaf, and garlic. Bring to a boil.
2. Lower the heat and simmer slowly for 30 minutes or until the chicken is tender. Remove the chicken from the pan and let it cool.
3. Carefully skim any fat from the surface of the soup. Return the soup to a boil and add onions, carrots, parsley, and celery. Simmer gently for 10 minutes.
4. Prepare the meatballs: Mix beef with egg, bread, salt, and pepper. Form into small meatballs and add them to the soup.
5. Continue simmering the soup with the meatballs for an additional 35 minutes.
6. Skim any foam from the surface of the soup.
7. Remove the chicken from the pan and shred it into small pieces.
8. Garnish the soup with shredded chicken and serve.
